coupon.source_phrase_block: 26 Oxford Street, Cambridge, MA, 02138 Map 617-495-3045 Each pass admits up to four people at 50% off regular admission rates. Redeem the pass at the Harvard Museum of Natural History or the Peabody Museum of Archeology and Ethnology Admission Desk. Includes access to all four HMSC museums: Annual membership of $200.00 provided by the Friends of Thayer Public Library. Physical (must be picked up at the library and returned) passes are available.
